title: Managed-device endpoint posture summary
description: One record per managed device across an MDM (Jamf Pro managed Mac, Microsoft Intune managed device): the device's disk-encryption state (FileVault / BitLocker), screen-lock / passcode-policy compliance, OS version, managed/enrollment state, and the MDM's overall compliance verdict — plus the device->owner ASSIGNMENT identity (opaque id + optional display name) needed to attribute the device for an access review. Pulled read-only from the MDM API (Jamf read-only API role; Intune Entra app with DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All). Posture/compliance SUMMARY only — NEVER device geolocation, installed-app inventory, device contents, browsing data, or owner personal contact detail (phone / personal email / address). The connector reports a descriptive posture; the platform evaluator owns the final pass/fail per (control, scope). Shared across the Jamf + Intune connectors because the two MDMs' device-posture field set is identical at the posture-summary altitude; the source_mdm field preserves provenance.

source_mdm.description: MDM the record was collected from.

device_id.description: MDM-native stable identifier of the managed device (opaque, non-secret).

device_name.description: Optional human-readable device / asset name (e.g. 'ENG-MBP-014'). An asset label, NOT owner personal contact detail.

disk_encryption_enabled.description: Whether full-disk encryption (FileVault on macOS / BitLocker on Windows) is enabled.

screen_lock_enabled.description: Whether a screen-lock / passcode policy is enforced and compliant on the device.

managed.description: Whether the device is currently managed/supervised by the MDM.

enrolled.description: Whether the device is currently enrolled in the MDM.

compliance_result.description: The MDM's overall device-compliance verdict. Descriptive — the platform evaluator owns the final pass/fail per (control, scope).

owner_assignment_id.description: Optional OPAQUE id of the assigned user — the minimum identity to attribute the device to an owner for an access review. NEVER the owner's personal email, phone, or address.

owner_display_name.description: Optional human-readable display name of the assigned user (e.g. 'A. Engineer'). Assignment identity, NOT contact detail.
